SEARCH

Uses of Class
server.net.ClientSession

Packages that use ClientSession
Package
Description
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.
server.subscription
Real-time push registry: SubscriptionRegistry maps subscription keys (e.g.

  • Uses of ClientSession in server.control

    Methods in server.control with parameters of type ClientSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private UserDTO
    VisitController.currentEmployee(ClientSession session)
    Recovers the park employee authenticated on this connection, for the server-side role check shared by every visit op.
    private UserDTO
    ParkController.currentStaff(ClientSession session)
    Recovers the staff user authenticated on this connection, for server-side role checks.
    private UserDTO
    ReportController.currentStaff(ClientSession session)
    Recovers the staff user authenticated on this connection, for the server-side role check.
    ServerResponse
    AuthController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Handles authentication and registration requests.
    ServerResponse
    DomainController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Handles one request and produces the response to send back.
    ServerResponse
    NotificationController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes notification requests for the currently logged-in actor.
    ServerResponse
    ParkController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes park management and parameter-change requests.
    ServerResponse
    ReportController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes report requests for a department manager.
    ServerResponse
    ReservationController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes reservation and waiting-list requests.
    ServerResponse
    VisitController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes visit and occupancy requests.
    private boolean
    AuthController.isServiceRep(ClientSession session)
    Server-side authorization gate for member/guide registration: resolves the connection's logged-in actor to a SERVICE_REP.
    private void
    AuthController.releasePriorSessionLock(ClientSession session)
    Releases the single-login lock this connection currently holds, if any, and clears its logged-in state — called at the start of a new login so a quick-login that switches actors on the same socket (e.g.

  • Uses of ClientSession in server.net

    Methods in server.net with parameters of type ClientSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServerResponse
    RequestRouter.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Dispatches one request: handles the infrastructure ops (PING / SUBSCRIBE / UNSUBSCRIBE) inline and routes every domain op to its registered controller.

  • Uses of ClientSession in server.subscription

    Fields in server.subscription with type parameters of type ClientSession
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<SubscriptionKey,Set<ClientSession>>
    SubscriptionRegistry.map
    Subscription key → the set of sessions subscribed to it.
    Methods in server.subscription with parameters of type ClientSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SubscriptionRegistry.register(ClientSession session, SubscriptionKey key)
    Records that session wants events for key, both in the shared registry bucket and on the session itself (so disconnect cleanup can find every key the session held).
    void
    SubscriptionRegistry.unregister(ClientSession session, SubscriptionKey key)
    Reverses a previous SubscriptionRegistry.register(server.net.ClientSession, common.dto.SubscriptionKey).
    void
    SubscriptionRegistry.unregisterAll(ClientSession session)
    Detaches session from every subscription it currently holds.
